---
title: "Resume"
---

# Resume

## Professional Summary

I am a Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management student at the University of British Columbia with a background in Geography and Environmental Management from the University of Waterloo. My experience spans GIS, spatial analysis, environmental planning, data visualization, and geospatial decision support. Across academic, co-op, and professional projects, I have worked with ArcGIS Pro, QGIS, Python, R, SQL, Tableau, and Power BI to support environmental analysis and infrastructure planning.

## Education

**Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management (MGEM)**\
University of British Columbia, Vancouver, Canada\
Expected April 2026

**Honours Bachelor of Environmental Studies (Co-op), Geography and Environmental Management**\
University of Waterloo, Waterloo, Canada\
Fall 2019 – April 2025

## Technical Skills

-   **GIS and Mapping:** ArcGIS Pro, ArcMap, QGIS, digital mapping, geocoding, network analysis
-   **Programming and Data Analysis:** Python, R, SQL Server, PostgreSQL/PostGIS, SPSS
-   **Visualization:** Tableau, Power BI, Excel
-   **Remote Sensing:** RADAR, LiDAR, Google Earth Engine, drone operation
-   **Applied Areas:** environmental impact assessment, regional planning, spatial analysis, risk mapping, project support

## Selected Experience

### GIS & Geospatial Intelligence Analyst

**AECO Innovation Lab**\
Richmond Hill, Canada\
January 2024 – April 2024

-   Conducted spatial analysis of land use change, transportation networks, and environmental constraints to support regional planning
-   Developed GIS-based models and produced maps and atlases for infrastructure and planning applications
-   Prepared technical reports and visual materials to communicate analytical results

### Data Analyst

**Accenture**\
Shanghai, China (Remote)\
May 2023 – August 2023

-   Collected, cleaned, and analyzed multi-source data using Python and SQL
-   Built automated reporting workflows to improve efficiency
-   Created data visualizations in Excel and Tableau to support decision-making

### Water & Wastewater Infrastructure Planner

**Region of Peel**\
Brampton, Canada\
September 2022 – December 2022

-   Produced maps and spatial outputs to support wastewater infrastructure planning
-   Processed and updated infrastructure-related datasets in ArcGIS and Excel
-   Supported technical documentation and project communication

### Research Assistant

**Fibos Inc.**\
Toronto, Canada\
July 2024 – August 2024

-   Researched combustion monitoring technologies and their environmental applications
-   Used Power BI to analyze and visualize system performance data
-   Contributed literature reviews, reporting, and sustainability-related analysis

## Certifications

-   Small Remotely Piloted Aircraft in Visual Line-Of-Sight (VLOS) Certificate
-   Applied Sustainability for Technical Managers Specialization Certificate
-   Renewable Energy Technology Fundamentals Certificate
-   The Sustainable Development Goals – A Global, Transdisciplinary Vision for the Future Certificate
-   Global Environmental Management Certificate

## Download Resume

[Download Yakun Zhou full resume](YakunZhou_resume_MGEM.pdf)
